subject: NovaHub Mini
answer: The NovaHub Mini has a two-year limited manufacturer warranty from the original purchase date.

subject: NovaCam Pro
answer: The NovaCam Pro has a one-year limited manufacturer warranty from the original purchase date.

subject: NovaHub Mini
answer: Connect the NovaHub Mini to power, open the NovaTech mobile application, select Add New Device and follow the instructions. Setup normally takes five minutes.

subject: NovaCam Pro
answer: The NovaCam Pro is configured through the NovaTech mobile application. Initial setup normally takes approximately ten minutes.
Unused products may be returned within 30 days of delivery and must include their original packaging and accessories.
Approved refunds are returned to the original payment method within five to ten working days.
Technical support is available Monday to Friday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.
